top_signals.title: US parks dozens of military aircraft at Israel’s Ben Gurion airport
top_signals.summary: Satellite images show at least 50 military tanker planes parked at the airfield in May
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Coupa adds Tonkean in latest AI acquisition push
top_signals.summary:
Coupa’s acquisition spree continued with the recent addition of Tonkean, a workflow automation platform aimed at automating procurement and supply chain workflows.

The post Coupa adds Tonkean in latest AI acquisition push  appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
